data.title: [onboarding]: lint-staged configured without lint-staged config -> pre-commit hook runs but performs no lint checks
data.description:
## Incident Overview

The onboarding skill configured a project with npx lint-staged in the pre-commit hook but failed to add a lint-staged configuration to package.json. As a result, the pre-commit hook executes but performs zero lint checks — lint violations are silently allowed through.

## Actual Behavior

The pre-commit hook runs: npx lint-staged
lint-staged has no configuration in package.json (or .lintstagedrc), so it exits 0 without running any linters.
No lint errors are surfaced on commit.

## Expected Behavior

Onboarding should either:
1. Add a lint-staged configuration block to package.json specifying which files trigger which lint commands, OR
2. Not configure lint-staged in the pre-commit hook if lint-staged config cannot be generated for the project

## Log Evidence

Pre-commit hook runs npx lint-staged but lint-staged has no configuration — it won't run any lint checks. I need to add lint-staged config to package.json.

## Impact

All lint violations bypass the pre-commit gate silently. The pre-commit hook appears to work (exits 0) but is effectively a no-op for lint enforcement.
